cover_prompt: Create a vertical image of a hyper-realistic 3D render of an exquisite invitation envelope designed for a debutante celebration, the envelope crafted from luxurious Tiffany green textured paper with delicate gold foil trim along the edges and intricate jasmine flower patterns embossed in subtle gold throughout, a rich light blue satin ribbon wrapped around the envelope in an elegant bow, a ornate wax seal in deep gold with embossed jasmine details securing the closure, the envelope resting on a marble surface with soft natural lighting highlighting the gold accents and creating gentle shadows, surrounding the envelope are scattered delicate white and pale yellow jasmine blossoms with green leaves, the background features a soft gradient of pale blue fading to Tiffany green, ultra-detailed with cinematic lighting, professional photography style, 8K resolution, Critical: No text.
sheet_prompt: Ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic 3D render of a blank ornamental invitation card designed for a debutante celebration, featuring a luxurious cream-colored cardstock with a subtle Tiffany green and light blue gradient wash, surrounded by an elaborate baroque gold frame with intricate jasmine flower motifs and delicate scrolling ornaments, the card resting on a velvet surface in soft ambient lighting, around the card are floating ethereal jasmine blossoms in white and pale gold with lush green leaves and subtle light blue accents in the background atmosphere, the center of the card is intentionally left completely blank and smooth for future text overlay, cinematic depth of field, professional studio lighting, photorealistic details, 8K ultra-high definition, Critical: No text.
